content:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=o8GKKhAdMLw

"I cherish the scent of every unique flower; the contours of their stem, the pigmentation of their petals, and the curvature of how their stamen don flow when a breeze afflateth them. 

Let it be known to thee: that to deprive me of my treasures, the appropriate price must be paid."

An original script Fan ASMR and exploration of the upcoming character of Xu from Morimens. I absolutely adore Rie Tanaka's work voicing Xu and in general, so I hoped to contribute my own very humble take on the character. Many gratiae.

UID: 100748055
